THAN-K（The Grateful One）

I thank the heavens! I thank the earth!

Dimension Pattern: MHM-HMM-HHM-MMH-MHL
You are one of the rarest personalities in China. THAN-K people can thank the heavens for almost anything. Even if traffic jams your commute, you can still thank the delay for the extra time, the music, and the chance to watch the anxious faces outside the window. They are warm, generous, and strangely hard to hate. In their world, there are no fully bad people - only friends who have not yet been touched by gratitude.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!
